items.title: Credit Agricole Increases BPM Stake, Boosting Position in Italy

items.description: At least eight ships attempting to leave the Persian Gulf along the Omani coast turned back between Friday and Saturday, in the latest sign that reopening the Strait of Hormuz remains complicated by I

items.title: Eastern US Heat Wave Starts to Retreat While Raising Storm Risk
items.description: Extreme heat that’s seared the eastern US, strained the power grid from Maine to the Carolinas and curtailed holiday celebrations is starting to break up.

items.title: ECB Is in ‘Good Position’ Given Inflation Data, Moulin Says
items.description: The European Central Bank is in a “good position” following an interest-rate hike last month and data showing inflation has eased with the slump in oil prices, Governing Council member Emmanuel Moulin

items.title: Total CEO Sees Mideast Producers Desperate to Sell Oil Stocks
items.description: Middle East oil producers are desperate to sell crude stockpiled during the recent Persian Gulf conflict, but gasoline and diesel inventories remain constrained due to shipping worries, TotalEnergies

items.title: Modi Says India Will Keep Expanding Oil Refining Capacity
items.description: India will continue to build new crude oil refineries in order to ensure supply chain security even as Western nations shut processing units, Prime Minister Narendra Modi said.

items.title: Oil Terminal in Russia’s St. Petersburg Comes Under Attack
items.description: Kyiv’s forces attacked an oil terminal in St. Petersburg, Russia’s second largest city, with drones overnight, local officials said, while Ukraine said a gas production facility was struck by Russia.

items.title: Macron’s Budget Finale Augurs More Political Chaos in France
items.description: The final budget showdown of Emmanuel Macron’s presidency is already gearing up to be France’s highest-stakes fiscal clash of the decade so far.

items.title: Ebola Vaccine Trials Could Start This Year
items.description: As Ebola cases rise in Congo and Uganda, vaccine developers are accelerating efforts to combat the rare Bundibugyo strain. IAVI CEO Mark Feinberg says a candidate vaccine could enter human trials by y

items.title: Zelenskyy Denies Putin Claim of Securing Donetsk Stronghold
items.description: Ukraine pushed back on a claim by Russian President Vladimir Putin that Kremlin forces have taken control of Kostiantynivka, a strategic logistics center in the Donetsk region, saying the heavily bomb

items.title: China Coast Guard Rotates Patrol Task Group East of Taiwan
items.description: China’s coast guard said a task group led by the CCGS Xiushan vessel replaced the team headed by CCGS Daishan on Saturday to continue law-enforcement patrols in waters east of Taiwan.

items.title: Energy-Hungry Asia Is Already Drawing Lessons From Iran Crisis

items.title: Venture Capital During the AI Revolution: Masters in Business with Mamoon Hamid
items.description: Barry sits down with Kleiner Perkins Partner, Mamoon Hamid. They discuss Mamoon's thoughts on the AI revolution and his approach to early AI investing.  Mamoon also breaks down how he became an early

items.title: 1ドル200円の円安シナリオ、高市氏インド訪問、W杯ピッチ外の戦い─1週間のニュース5選
items.description: マーケットで話題になったニュースから、1週間を振り返る五つのトピックを厳選して紹介します。

items.title: SQM-Codelco Venture Maps Path to Higher Lithium Output in Chile
items.description: Chilean mining companies SQM and Codelco are paving the way to boost output at their sprawling lithium partnership by more than 70%, in a long-term bet on battery demand.

items.title: ECB’s Lagarde Will Attend Next Week’s Ecofin Instead of Vujcic
items.description: European Central Bank President Christine Lagarde will be attending next week’s meeting of European Union finance ministers in Brussels instead of her vice president.

items.title: ECB’s Nagel Stresses Need for Vigilance at Next Rate Decision
items.description: The European Central Bank should stay watchful for inflation risks and keep its options open, Governing Council member Joachim Nagel said.

items.title: CPP Invests $1.75 Billion in EQT’s AI Buildout
items.description: Canada Pension Plan Investment Board will invest $1.75 billion to support EQT AB’s artificial intelligence infrastructure buildout, it announced Friday.
